description: Civics-charter cell output. Adherent SBT informed-consent baseline per ADR-2605261000 §2. Demonstrates adherent has engaged with charter content (not a graded test — see G10 no examination-as-coercion; self-paced demonstration only). Per ADR-2605261045.

demonstrationCid.description: Self-paced demonstration artifact (essay / discussion log / question-asking record); NOT a graded test
